prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年河南省理科（物理类）最低录取位次分别为约18927名、331名、239名、304名、3171名。2021年位次异常偏高系因当年包含医学试验班低分专业；2022–2024年仅招临床医学本博连读/卓越医生计划，位次稳定在200–330名区间；2025年因招生专业扩展至预防医学、药学等，最低位次后移至3171名，近两年位次波动较大；该校在河南省理科（物理类）招生计划：2021年9人、2022年3人、2023年3人、2024年3人、2025年30人（因高考改革专业组扩编），2026年计划36人，较2025年增加6人，扩招幅度约20%，扩招有利于降低录取门槛。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 复旦大学上海医学院依托复旦大学（985、211、双一流），软科中国大学主榜排名第5（2026年），属全国顶尖高校层次，医学学科实力位居国内第一方阵；2026年声誉评价为偏负面，涉及师德师风及学校管理事件，可能轻微抑制部分考生报考热情；抖音热度排名第4（高热），短视频平台曝光量大，整体关注度极高；历史投档异常方面，2022年复旦大学在河南理科曾出现投档线暴跌信号，但2023–2025年已趋于稳定；依托复旦大学学科评估结果：临床医学A、公共卫生与预防医学A+、护理学A-、药学A、基础医学A等，医学类学科实力突出，对高分考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 临床医学、口腔医学等医学类专业连续多年高热推荐（2024年–77），社会报考热度持续高涨；河南省2026年高考总人数约120万，较2025年（约90.7万）大幅增加，物理类考生估算约73.4万，同比增加约32.3%，竞争显著加剧；复旦大学上海医学院位于上海，属一线城市高校，对河南考生有较强地域吸引力；该校在河南招生占比近年有所提升（2025年河南招生35人，占全国总招生490人的7.14%），跨省报考热度较高。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次3171名、2026年扩招20%（使位次后移约380名）与河南省物理类考生大幅增加约32.3%（使位次前移）的相互对冲，以及声誉偏负面、抖音高热、医学专业持续热门等多因素，预计2026年最低录取位次约3502名，较2025年小幅后移（更容易进），区间3103–3901名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 临床医学（临床医师班）
- 临床医学（含卓越临床医师班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 口腔医学（含卓越口腔医师班）
- 临床医学（含卓越临床医师班，102专业组）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 预防医学（含预防医学拔尖班）
- 药学（含药学拔尖班、产教融合班）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间3103–3901名内，建议以二档专业（口腔医学、临床医学卓越班）为主攻方向，一档专业（临床医学八年制临床医师班）作为冲刺，三档专业（预防医学、药学）作为稳妥保底。位次明显优于区间下限（<3103名）可重点冲刺一档王牌临床医学专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Henan Province Science (Physics Category) were approximately 18927, 331, 239, 304, and 3171 respectively. The abnormally high ranking in 2021 was due to the inclusion of low-scoring majors in the Medical Experimental Class; from 2022 to 2024, only the Clinical Medicine MD-PhD/Excellent Doctor Program was offered, with rankings stable in the 200–330 range; in 2025, due to the expansion of enrollment majors to include Preventive Medicine, Pharmacy, etc., the minimum ranking shifted to 3171, with significant fluctuations in recent two years; the enrollment plan for this university in Henan Province Science (Physics Category): 9 in 2021, 3 in 2022, 3 in 2023, 3 in 2024, 30 in 2025 (due to expansion of major groups under the college entrance examination reform), and 36 planned for 2026, an increase of 6 compared to 2025, an expansion rate of about 20%, which is conducive to lowering the admission threshold.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Fudan University Shanghai Medical College relies on Fudan University (985, 211, Double First-Class), ranking 5th in the main list of Shanghai Ranking's Best Chinese Universities (2026), belonging to the top tier of national universities, with medical discipline strength in the first echelon domestically; the reputation evaluation in 2026 is somewhat negative, involving incidents of teacher ethics and school management, which may slightly suppress some candidates' enthusiasm for application; Douyin popularity ranks 4th (high heat), with high exposure on short video platforms, overall attention is extremely high; in terms of historical admission anomalies, Fudan University experienced a signal of a sharp drop in admission cutoffs in Henan Science in 2022, but has stabilized from 2023 to 2025; relying on Fudan University's discipline evaluation results: Clinical Medicine A, Public Health and Preventive Medicine A+, Nursing A-, Pharmacy A, Basic Medicine A, etc., the medical disciplines are outstanding, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Medical majors such as Clinical Medicine and Stomatology have been highly recommended for consecutive years (2024–77), with sustained high social application enthusiasm; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Henan Province college entrance examination is about 1.2 million, a significant increase from 2025 (about 907,000), with an estimated 734,000 Physics Category candidates, an increase of about 32.3% year-on-year, significantly intensifying competition; Fudan University Shanghai Medical College is located in Shanghai, a first-tier city university, with strong regional appeal to Henan candidates; the proportion of enrollment in Henan has increased in recent years (35 students enrolled in Henan in 2025, accounting for 7.14% of the national total enrollment of 490), with high cross-province application enthusiasm.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 3171, the 2026 enrollment expansion of 20% (shifting the ranking back by about 380 places) and the significant increase of about 32.3% in Henan Physics Category candidates (shifting the ranking forward) offsetting each other, along with the somewhat negative reputation, high Douyin heat, and sustained popularity of medical majors, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for 2026 will be about 3502, slightly shifted back (easier to enter) compared to 2025, with a range of 3103–3901.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Clinical Medicine (Clinical Physician Class)
- Clinical Medicine (Including Excellent Clinical Physician Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Stomatology (Including Excellent Stomatologist Class)
- Clinical Medicine (Including Excellent Clinical Physician Class, Major Group 102).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Preventive Medicine (Including Preventive Medicine Top-Notch Class)
- Pharmacy (Including Pharmacy Top-Notch Class, Industry-Education Integration Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 3103–3901, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Stomatology, Clinical Medicine Excellent Class) as the main direction, Tier 1 majors (Clinical Medicine Eight-Year Clinical Physician Class) as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors (Preventive Medicine, Pharmacy) as a safe backup. For rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<3103), focus on sprinting for the top-tier Tier 1 Clinical Medicine major.
